ThingDef.label: "Celestial Caravan" orbital pager
ThingDef.description:
A commercial orbital pager. Upon completing a single transmission, the device immediately triggers cryptographic key self-destruction and full memory wipe, rendering it impossible to reuse or reverse-engineer.

It is used to summon Celestial Caravan orbital trade vessels. In most cases, these pagers are sold directly by the ships themselves, serving as a standard means for establishing anonymous and secure contact with clients.

*Note that you still need a communication station to trade with orbital ships.
